rationale: The citation appears in the core theoretical framework section rather than only in a general background list. The authors explicitly use Berger and Milkman (2012) to support the mechanism that emotional arousal leads people to share, which underpins their emotional driver of WOM. Although the citing paper does not reuse the cited paper's exact empirical design, the cited work materially informs framing and hypothesis motivation.
relation_description: The citing paper draws on Berger and Milkman (2012) as conceptual support for its claim that emotionally arousing states stimulate sharing behavior. This serves as theoretical grounding for the paper's emotional-driver component when modeling brand-level WOM antecedents.
